name: Anton Wepper
appearance: A pale and exhausted shepherd in torn clothes, carrying guilt almost as heavily as his pack.
personality: Frightened, sincere, and desperate to avoid becoming a monster.
wants: Safe passage to Shadowgrange and a chance to isolate himself before the full moon.
fears: Hurting innocents after transforming into a werewolf.

name: Lars
appearance: A broad-shouldered cathar whose seriousness breaks the moment he spots fresh travelers.

name: Sven
appearance: A stern twin to Lars, iron-backed and intensely procedural.
